text:
1. Calculate the time difference: Asia/Riyadh is UTC+3 and US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, so the time difference is 3 - (-10)=13 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 07:00 + 13:00 = 20:00.
3. Since the time addition doesn't cross a day boundary, the date remains October 26, 1627.
FINAL_ANSWER: 20:00
